arts.ttl: Roma’s Le Fee: Agent reveals Interest from top clubs Including Milan
arts.sum: Enzo Le Fee, one of Roma’s most expensive summer signings, is poised to make a comeback after a two-month injury layoff due to a collateral ligament issue. The French midfielder, who has only played two matches for the Giallorossi so far, is eager to establish himself as a key player in Ivan Juric’s squad. Le Fee’s arrival at Roma was not without controversy. His signing, orchestrated by sporting director Florent Ghisolfi, remained the club’s sole summer acquisition for an extended period, causing some discontent for manager Daniele De Rossi. arts.ttl: Douglas Luiz’s controversial punch on Patric: Referee oversight and potential consequences ahead of Inter-Juventus clash
arts.sum: In the 83rd minute of a tense 0-0 match between Juventus and Lazio, a controversial incident involving Douglas Luiz and Patric went unnoticed by match officials. The Brazilian midfielder appeared to strike Patric with either a punch or an elbow, an action that many believe warranted a red card for violent conduct. Calciomercato report how Referee Sacchi missed the incident, and surprisingly, VAR official Di Paolo did not intervene. This oversight has raised questions about the effectiveness and consistency of VAR implementation in Serie A. arts.ttl: Serie A | Roma v Inter: Probable starting lineups
arts.sum: The eighth round of Serie A resumes with a bang as Roma hosts Inter in a highly anticipated match. Both teams are looking to make a statement after the international break. Roma remains unbeaten under new manager Ivan Juric but are coming off a controversial draw with Monza where they were denied a late penalty. Inter, on the other hand, secured a thrilling 3-2 victory over Torino in their last outing thanks to a Marcus Thuram hat-trick. arts.ttl: Walter Sabatini launches scathing attack on Roma’s American owners
arts.sum: Walter Sabatini, former Roma executive and currently without a role after leaving Salernitana, has launched a blistering attack on the American ownership of AS Roma in a recent interview with Corriere della Sera.
